step.name: Step 1: Fica claim process
step.text: Fica claim process — Reclaim Tax Credits walks you through our restaurant payroll tax fica claim process in New York City. A compliance-first tax consultancy service helping restaurants, bars and nightclubs CPA/accountants learn how to gain tax credits and refunds. We specialize in leveraging federal programs to capture tax credits and maximize FICA tax refunds for the past 3 years to increase profitability for businesses.
